chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 87 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.572/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.573/2026 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 28.01.2026 Ms. Rabia Bhatti, Advocate along with applicants / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Office objection need not be considered as the matter is being disposed of. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Applicant / accused Nisar Ali (Nisar Ahmed as per FIR) S/o Khan Muhammad and Javed Shaikh S/o Ghulam Muhammad, both by caste Shaikh, seek protective bail in Crime No.81 of 2023, registered at Police Station Kandhra, District Sukkur, under Sections 302, 114, 34, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that the applicants / accused are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest at the hands of police. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicants / accused for a period of five days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBWs, if any, shall stand suspended for the period of five days. Applicants / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicants surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.

This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of five days or when the applicants surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
